The '''Type-12 A Anti-Personnel Rocket''' was an ammunition type produced by [[Locris Syndicates/Legends|Locris Syndicates]]<ref name="EGWT" /> and [[Locris Syndicated Securities/Legends|Locris Syndicated Securities]]. An anti-personnel rocket,<ref name="AE" /> the Type-12A employed an explosive contact [[Detonator/Legends|detonator]]. The Type-12A was compatible with Locris Syndicates' [[Model RDP-12 Rocket Launcher]],<ref name="GG10" /> and the [[MM9 mini concussion rocket launcher/Legends|MM9 rocket system]] produced by [[Kelvarek Consolidated Arms/Legends|Kelvarex Consolidated Arms]].<ref name="EGWT" />

Both [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango]] and [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] used the Type-12A rocket.
